title: Unitarity limits on triple gauge boson production
author_string: O. J. P. Éboli, M. C. Gonzalez-Garcia
abstract: We derive the unitarity constraints on anomalous quartic gauge couplings originating from the $f \bar{f}^\prime \to V V' V''$ channel with $V^{(')('')}=γ$, $Z$, $W^\pm$, and $H$. We also assess the importance of these bounds on the present and future experimental searches.
